case_title: ZHI MEI VS. ANNE SUISHEUNG FU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2017 -CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OF DEFENDANTS CLAIM TO JAN-04-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT ZHI MEI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANNE FU IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT CLAIM AND THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,377.69 FILED BY MEI, ZHI AS TO DEFENDANT FU, ANNE SUISHEUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED OCT-16-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FU, ANNE SUISHEUNG
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,989.85 FILED BY FU, ANNE SUISHEUNG AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MEI, ZHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE: $80.00) SERVED DEC-15-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MEI, ZHI
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FU, ANNE SUISHEUNG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MEI, ZHI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MEI, ZHI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEI, ZHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FU, ANNE SUISHEUNG $3,377.69 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,487.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT FU, ANNE SUISHEUNG
